Profile

Strategic content leader with 6+ years building and scaling B2B editorial operations for global tech and telecoms media brands. Progressed from reporter to deputy editor at Capacity, growing annual readership to over one million and pioneering a gated report series that drove subscriber acquisition and commercial leads across five industry verticals.

Experienced in cross-channel content strategy, editorial and commercial alignment, and building content that serves both audience and revenue goals simultaneously. Confident leading teams, managing senior stakeholders, and owning content operations end-to-end — across digital, print, video, and live events including MWC, ITW, and Capacity Europe.

Experience

Capacity
Sep 2021 — Present
Deputy Editor

Global B2B brand covering telecoms, cloud, and digital infrastructure. 1M+ annual readers.

  • Pioneered the State of the Sector report series: original research across five industry verticals (subsea, data centres, AI, connectivity, and digital infrastructure), gated behind a subscriber wall and generating measurable download and lead volumes for the commercial team.
  • Helped scale annual readership to over one million, owning editorial quality, content strategy, commissioning, and production standards across all digital and print channels.
  • Led end-to-end content strategy across digital, print, audio, and video, driving engagement among senior telecom, cloud, and infrastructure decision-makers.
  • Built and managed the editorial and commercial bridge, aligning content output with subscription growth, lead generation, and revenue objectives.
  • Produced and edited long-form features, cover stories, and executive interviews — maintaining a 50k+ subscriber daily newsletter.
  • Mentored and developed two junior journalists, raising editorial standards across the team.
  • Moderated high-profile industry panels at MWC, ITW, and Capacity Europe.
  • Directed on-camera interviews and short-form video content, expanding Capacity's multimedia reach and brand authority.
Mobile News / WhatMobile.net
Sep 2019 — Sep 2021
Content Writer & Digital Editor

Multi-platform content lead across consumer and B2B tech titles.

  • Lead content writer and digital editor across two titles, shaping editorial tone, managing the content calendar, and collaborating with freelance contributors.
  • Produced daily content optimised for SEO and user engagement across a leading telecoms and consumer tech website.
  • Authored in-depth product reviews across mobile hardware, wearables, and accessories.
  • Wrote monthly magazine features translating complex technology into accessible long-form stories.
  • Managed social media channels across Twitter, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
  • Produced and edited branded video content using Adobe Premiere Pro, including interviews, demos, and event highlights.
  • Delivered live event coverage at the Mobile News Awards.
Panel Moderation — Asia 2023
